UsageBased.description: Usage-based billing settled after metered delivery

GrantFieldStreamPolicy.description: Field-level stream policy bound into protected delivery and grants.

ProtectedDeliveryBinding.description: Immutable encrypted artifact/window metadata for protected delivery.

ProviderReputation.description: Provider reputation summary surfaced in marketplace listings.

OBJECT_IDS.description: Specific NORAD IDs or catalog numbers

MIN_ALTITUDE_KM.description: Minimum altitude in kilometers for altitude-bounded offerings

MAX_ALTITUDE_KM.description: Maximum altitude in kilometers for altitude-bounded offerings

GEO_BOUNDS.description: Bounding box as [min_lat, min_lon, max_lat, max_lon]

DataCoverage.description: Data coverage combining spatial and temporal

PRICE_AMOUNT.description: Price in smallest unit (cents, satoshis, etc.)

RATE_LIMIT.description: Rate limit in requests per hour

FEATURES.description: List of features included in this tier

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID of the data provider

PROVIDER_EPM_CID.description: IPFS CID of provider's EPM (Entity Profile Message)

DESCRIPTION.description: Detailed description of the data offering

ENCRYPTION_REQUIRED.description: Whether encryption is required for data delivery

CREATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when listing was created

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when listing was last updated

ACTIVE.description: Whether the listing is currently active

LISTING_KIND.description: Listing category: data stream or WASM module

SAMPLE_RECORD_COUNT.description: Number of records in sample data, when available

PROTECTED_DELIVERY.description: Protected delivery metadata for encrypted artifacts or streams

EXPIRES_AT.description: Unix timestamp when the listing expires, or 0 for no expiry

SOURCE_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID this listing was sourced from when discovered remotely

CZMDynValueType.description: Dynamic value types for time-varying properties

grantLifecycleStatus.description: Grant lifecycle status tracked by the provider.

CZMDynInterval.description: A single interval in a time-varying property

VALUE_TYPE.description: Value type determines stride through DATA

DATA.description: Interleaved [time, value(s), ...] — stride depends on VALUE_TYPE

SAMPLED.description: Sampled data (when property uses epoch + data array)

HEIGHT.description: Height in meters above WGS84 ellipsoid

CZMCartographicDegrees.description: Cartographic position (longitude, latitude, height in radians/meters)

CZMCartesian.description: Cartesian position (X, Y, Z in meters)

LINE_COUNT_X.description: Number of grid lines along X

LINE_COUNT_Y.description: Number of grid lines along Y

LINE_THICKNESS_X.description: Thickness of grid lines along X

LINE_THICKNESS_Y.description: Thickness of grid lines along Y

LINE_OFFSET_X.description: Offset of grid lines along X

LINE_OFFSET_Y.description: Offset of grid lines along Y

CZMMaterial.description: Surface material (used by polygon, ellipse, box, etc.)

POSITIONS_CARTOGRAPHIC_DEGREES.description: Positions as cartographic degrees [lon, lat, height, lon, lat, height, ...]

POSITIONS_CARTESIAN.description: Positions as Cartesian [X, Y, Z, X, Y, Z, ...]

POSITIONS_CARTOGRAPHIC_DEGREES.description: Positions as cartographic degrees [lon, lat, height, ...]

CLOSE_TOP.description: Whether to close the top of extruded polygon

CLOSE_BOTTOM.description: Whether to close the bottom of extruded polygon

POSITIONS_CARTOGRAPHIC_DEGREES.description: Positions as cartographic degrees [lon, lat, height, ...]

LEAD_TIME.description: Trail time in seconds (how far behind)

TRAIL_TIME.description: Lead time in seconds (how far ahead)

COORDINATES_WSEN_DEGREES.description: Coordinates [west, south, east, north] in degrees

POSITION_EPOCH.description: Time-tagged positions [time, lon, lat, height, time, lon, lat, height, ...]

ORIENTATION_ARRAY.description: Orientation sampled data [t, x, y, z, w, t, x, y, z, w, ...]

DYNAMIC_PROPERTIES.description: Generic bag for all time-dynamic (non-static) properties

CZMPacket.description: A CZML Packet describing an entity and its properties

LISTING_ID.description: ID of the listing this grant applies to

BUYER_ENCRYPTION_PUBKEY.description: Buyer's encryption public key for encrypted delivery

TIER_NAME.description: Name of the pricing tier purchased

GRANTED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when access was granted

EXPIRES_AT.description: Unix timestamp when access expires (0 = never expires)

PAYMENT_TX_HASH.description: Transaction hash or reference proving payment

UsageBased.description: Usage-based billing settled after metered delivery

KEY_ALGORITHM.description: Key algorithm for buyer encryption public key

TOTAL_REQUESTS.description: Total requests made under this grant

TOTAL_RECORDS.description: Total records delivered under this grant

CREATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when the grant record was created

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when the grant record was updated

FIELD_STREAM_POLICY.description: Field-level stream policy bound to this grant

ACL.description: Access Control Grant - Permission to access purchased data

QUERY_ID.description: Stable query identifier within the workspace

ACTIVE.description: Whether this query is active (applied) when the workspace opens

WKSQuery.description: One saved FlatSQL query belonging to a workspace.

APP_ID.description: `$APP.ID` of the application this workspace belongs to

QUERIES.description: FlatSQL query state captured with the scene

CREATED_AT.description: Unix ms the workspace was created

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix ms the workspace was last updated

WKS.description: Workspace — named scene snapshot + FlatSQL query state + share grants
